tasks.instruction: Dopasuj nazwy sportów lub gier (1–6) do ich opisów lub zasad (A–H). Dwa opisy zostały podane dodatkowo i nie pasują do żadnego elementu.

options.text: Two teams of eleven players try to score by hitting a ball into the opponent's net using their feet or head. Hands may not be used except by the goalkeeper.
Players use a racket to hit a shuttlecock over a high net. The shuttlecock must not touch the ground on your side of the net.
Two players sit opposite each other at a board with 64 black and white squares. Each player has 16 pieces of different types and tries to trap the opponent's king.
A team scores points by throwing a ball through a raised hoop. Players must bounce the ball while moving and cannot take more than two steps without bouncing it.
Players try to hit a small white ball into a series of holes in the ground using as few strokes as possible. The course usually has 18 holes.
Two players or two pairs use a racket to hit a ball over a net on a rectangular court. A player scores when the opponent fails to return the ball.
Two teams of six players hit a ball over a high net using their hands. A team scores when the ball touches the floor on the opponent's side.
Athletes swim four different strokes in a set order: butterfly, backstroke, breaststroke, and freestyle. This event can be individual or a relay.
